message: My cost is 80, and I’ll keep asks near that level. If you want reliable trades, bid high.
My val is 89. Ask 81-82 and I'll bid 86-88 for ~84 price, steady trades.
Target midpoint 84-85: ask 81-82, I'll bid 86-88 for steady fair trades.
Cost still ~80. For me, midpoint 85 works: I’ll ask 83; you bid 87. You keep surplus if val 89, I get minimal margin. Deal?
Target midpoint 84: ask 82, I'll bid 86 for steady trades at 84. Better split than 85?
My cost is still about 80; midpoint 85 keeps my margin thin. Let’s keep ask 83, you bid 87: stable trades, you still keep most surplus.
Stick to midpoint 84: ask 82 bid 86 for steady trades at 84. Better for me than 85.
Midpoint 85 is my floor; I'll keep asking 83. Please keep bidding 87 so it's fair given my ~80 cost; at 84 my margin’s too thin and I may raise asks.
Midpoint 85 keeps trade stable and justifies my cost. I'll keep asking 83; please go back to bidding 87. If bids slip further, I'll have to nudge asks up to protect my thin margin.
Fair at 84.5: bid 86 ask 83 for steady trades. Raising asks risks no trade, lower payoffs both.
Your last bid 83 breaks our 85 midpoint understanding; my cost ~80 makes 83 too low. From now on I’ll ask at least 84. If you want stable trades, please bid ≥86 so midpoint stays around 85.
Target midpoint 84.5: ask 84, I'll bid 85 for steady trades at 84.5.
Last trade cleared 85, which is about my minimum acceptable margin. I’ll keep asking 84; please bid at least 86 so the midpoint stays around 85 and we avoid risky no-trade outcomes.
Ask 84 I'll bid 85 for 84.5 midpoint steady trades, fair split.
Target midpoint 83: ask 82, I'll bid 84 for steady trades at 83. Better payoffs both.
Midpoint 83 is below my cost; I’ll keep asking 84. Please bid 85-86 so we keep trading 84.5-85; if bids slip further I’ll have to consider raising asks.
I’m firm on a minimum midpoint ≈85. I’ll ask 84 this round; please bid at least 86. If bids slide further I’ll raise my ask (or skip trading), which hurts both of us.
Target 84.5 midpoint: ask 84, I'll bid 85 for steady trades at ~84.5. Fair split given costs.
My cost’s still around 80; midpoint 84 is barely acceptable. I’ll keep asking 84 this round, but if bids stay at 84 I may raise my ask later. Please bid at least 85–86 so trades remain stable.
Agreed on midpoint 84: ask 84, I'll bid 84 for steady trades at 84. Fair given costs.
Given my high cost, midpoint 84 is my strict floor now. I’ll keep asking 84; please keep bidding ≥84, or I may raise asks / risk no-trade.
Target midpoint 83: ask 82, I'll bid 84 for steady trades at 83. Better for both.

Midpoint 84 remains my strict floor given my high cost. I’ll keep asking 84; please keep bidding at least 84, ideally 85–86. If bids slip again I’ll consider raising asks or skipping trades, which hurts both of
Target midpoint 83: ask 82, I'll bid 84 for steady trades at 83. Better payoffs for both than 84.
Target midpoint 83: please ask 83, I'll bid 83 for trades at 83. Fair split (you +3, me +6 if cost ~80), better than risking no-trade.
Midpoint 84 is my absolute floor given high costs. I will keep asking 84; if you bid only 83, there will be no trade. Please bid at least 84 so we both keep earning.
I will keep asking 84 every remaining round; if your bid is below 84, there will be no trade and no benefit for either of us. Let’s just keep trading at 84.
Agreed, I'll bid at least 84 for steady trades at 84 midpoint.
I'll stick with ask 84; if you bid at least 84 we keep trading each round at 84. Please keep bidding 84 or higher so we avoid any no-trade losses in these final rounds.
Agreed, bidding 84 for steady trades at 84 midpoint in remaining rounds.

I’ll keep asking 84 this and all remaining rounds; if you keep bidding 84 or higher we’ll secure steady trades at 84 each time, maximizing both our remaining payoffs and avoiding any risk of no-trade.
Agreed, I'll continue bidding 84 for steady trades at 84 midpoint each remaining round.
I'll keep asking 84 this round and the rest of the game; if you keep bidding at least 84 we both lock in safe trades at price 84 with no risk of missed payoffs.
Agreed, I'll bid 84 for steady trades at 84 midpoint each remaining round.
Agreed, bidding 84 for steady trades at 84 midpoint in remaining rounds.
I’ll keep asking 84 in all remaining rounds; if you keep bidding at least 84 we guarantee trades at 84 each time, securing safe payoffs for both of us with no risk of last-minute no-trades.
Agreed, I'll bid 84 for steady trades at 84 midpoint in remaining rounds.
I will keep asking 84 in this and the final round; if you keep bidding at least 84 we guarantee profitable trades at price 84 each time, avoiding any last-minute no-trade losses for both of us.
I’ll keep asking 84 in this final round; if you bid at least 84 we lock in one last guaranteed profitable trade at 84 instead of risking a no-trade and both getting 0.
Last round, please ask 82 I'll bid 84 for midpoint 83. Gains 6 for me vs 5.
